docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TING, TARA HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TARA TING IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO SEP-30-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARA TING IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED MAY-17-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TING, TARA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT TARA TING IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEARSON, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TING, TARA $632.93 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $712.93, CARPET CLEANING, PG&E BILL, 2 BROKEN GLASSES; REMAINING CLAIMS DENIED - NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR ON RENTAL PROPERTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY PEARSON, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT TING, TARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF REBECCA PEARSON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARA TING IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
